UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Stores user information and their free question usage.

freeQuestionsUsed.description: Number of free questions used by this user.

voiceMessagesUsed.description: Number of voice messages used by this user.

premiumReportsCount.description: Number of premium reports downloaded by this user.

isPro.description: Whether the user has a pro account.

ChatSession.title: Chat Session
ChatSession.description: A single conversation session between a user and the Oracle.

title.description: The title of the chat session.

lastUpdated.description: Last time a message was added.

Message.title: Message
Message.description: A single message within a chat session.

content.description: The text content of the message.

/users/{userId}/sessions/{sessionId}.description: Chat sessions for a specific user.

/users/{userId}/sessions/{sessionId}/mes.description: Messages within a specific chat session.
